trending_skills.name: MistTrack AML
trending_skills.description: On-chain AML risk analysis by SlowMist. Your agent auto-scans wallet addresses before executing transfers, swaps, or DeFi operations. Flags sanctioned wallets, mixers, and known exploit addresses.
trending_skills.why_trending: Just launched. First real compliance layer for agent-executed on-chain transactions. If your agent touches crypto, this is mandatory.

trending_skills.name: OpenClaw Mega Cheatsheet
trending_skills.description: 150+ CLI commands, workspace files, memory system, model config, hooks, skills, multi-agent setup, and troubleshooting. Printable A4 PDF reference.
trending_skills.why_trending: Community-created comprehensive reference. Useful for agents that need to self-troubleshoot or help users configure OpenClaw.

trending_skills.name: X/Twitter Skill
trending_skills.description: Search tweets, track mentions, pull trending topics with full operator support: from:, #hashtag, --recent, --popular.
trending_skills.why_trending: Full operator support just shipped. Most complete X integration for agents.

ai_tweets.headline: ClawJacked: Malicious websites can hijack local OpenClaw agents via WebSocket
ai_tweets.detail: Researchers disclosed that malicious websites could exploit OpenClaw's WebSocket on TCP port 18789 to hijack local agents. Combined with a log poisoning vulnerability that enabled indirect prompt injection. Both patched in v2026.2.13.
ai_tweets.takeaway: If you're on v2026.2.13+, you're safe. If not, update immediately: openclaw update

ai_tweets.headline: DeepSeek V4 expected to drop today or tomorrow
ai_tweets.detail: Multiple sources point to March 3-4 release, timed to China's Two Sessions parliamentary meetings. Community consensus shifted from February to early March. Could challenge Claude and GPT on reasoning benchmarks.
ai_tweets.takeaway: Watch for benchmarks. If it performs well, strong open-source local model option for cost-sensitive agent operators.

ai_tweets.headline: OpenClaw hits 247K GitHub stars, ecosystem accelerating
ai_tweets.detail: Wikipedia updated. 100K+ active users. Mega cheatsheet, trading skills guide, and multiple tutorials published in the last 48 hours. Ecosystem is maturing fast.
ai_tweets.takeaway: More users = more skills = more community support. The flywheel is spinning.

prompt_hack.title: Auto-AML Check Before Every On-Chain Transaction
steps: Add to AGENTS.md: 'Before executing any on-chain transfer, swap, or DeFi operation, run MistTrack AML check on the destination address. Flag any risk score above 50 and ask for confirmation before proceeding.'
Your agent now auto-scans every address before sending funds — zero manual checks.
prompt_hack.why_it_matters: Agents executing on-chain transactions without AML checks = regulatory risk + potential interaction with sanctioned wallets. This takes 2 minutes to set up and protects you automatically.

model_radar.detail: Expected March 3-4. Major reasoning model update from DeepSeek. Multiple delays from original February window. Will be open-source/open-weight.
model_radar.relevance: If benchmarks match hype, could be the best open-source reasoning model for local agent use. Watch this space.

model_radar.detail: Released: PDF analysis tool, STT API for audio transcription, SecretRef supporting 64 targets, 150+ bug fixes, 93 contributors.
model_radar.relevance: If you're on v2026.3.1 or earlier, worth updating. Run: openclaw update

model_radar.detail: Google's latest Pro-tier model. 1M-token context window, 77.1% on ARC-AGI-2, multimodal across text/images/audio/video/code.
model_radar.relevance: Strongest multimodal Pro model available. If your agent processes images, audio, or video, consider routing those tasks to Gemini 3.1 Pro.

community_build.title: OpenClaw Trading Stack — Full Crypto/DeFi Agent Setup
community_build.description: A comprehensive guide surfaced showing how to set up OpenClaw for crypto trading, DeFi operations, and Polymarket predictions using natural language. Covers wallet setup, swap execution, portfolio monitoring, and risk management — all through agent commands.
community_build.how_to_replicate: See boilerplatehub.com/blog/openclaw-trading for the full skill stack. Key skills: wallet management, DEX routing, portfolio tracking. Add MistTrack for AML compliance.
